query_string:
drop table if exists l2_integration_datamart.cls_td_time_slot_v10;
create table l2_integration_datamart.cls_td_time_slot_v10 as 
select
  business_day as business_date
  , cluster_id
  , cast(null as bigint) as therapist_id
  , mst_shop_id as property_id
  , mst_shop_name
  , business_hour
  , time_slot as td_time_slot
  , td1
  , td2
  , td3
  , forecast_value
  , loss_opps_fin_value
from
  _l2_demand_forecast_gcp.fin_timeslot_raw_vtable_v10
;

/* ============================================================================================= */
